falconHeavy.title: Falcon Heavy Platform
falconHeavy.subtitle: Subscription-based group management and administrative tools
falconHeavy.short: A full-stack platform for subscription handling, payments, and location-based group management.
highlights: Scalable backend built with Fastify and Bull workers for background processing
Integrated Google Maps for dynamic group and administrative visualization
Role-based access, subscription management, and subscription/payment-related workflow logic
description: Falcon Heavy is a full-stack web platform designed to manage subscription-based groups and administrative workflows. It combines a modular Fastify API with React-powered interfaces and integrates background jobs using Bull and Redis.
The system supports subscription and payment-related workflow logic, privilege-based group creation, subscription management, and administrative dashboards optimized for large datasets.
The platform also integrates Google Maps to provide location-aware group visualization and real-time administrative insights.

creditcloser.title: Creditcloser Loan Management System
creditcloser.subtitle: Web application for loan creation, debtor notifications, and full administrative control.
creditcloser.short: A full loan management platform with automated notifications, reporting, and a powerful admin panel.
highlights: Built loan management workflows for admins, borrowers, payments, notifications, and reporting
Implemented scheduled email/SMS notifications using SendGrid, Twilio, templates, and cron jobs
Developed secure authentication and session handling with Passport and Redis
Deployed the system with Docker, Nginx, and AWS-related infrastructure
description: The Creditcloser application is a full-featured loan management system designed to streamline financial operations for administrators. It provides tools to create loans, manage users, and automate borrower notifications.
The frontend includes a React-powered admin dashboard built with Material UI and React Admin, enabling efficient handling of loan data, users, payments, and monthly profit reports.

The backend integrates Express, PostgreSQL, Sequelize, and Redis to implement secure authentication, automated email workflows using SendGrid and Handlebars, and scheduled reporting tasks via node-cron.
The system also includes infrastructure-level tooling such as Docker, Nginx, and AWS services to ensure reliable deployment and smooth performance.

ndaB2BCommerce.title: NDA B2B Commerce Platform
ndaB2BCommerce.subtitle: Full-stack multi-role B2B commerce system with advanced inventory, ordering, and administrative capabilities.
ndaB2BCommerce.short: B2B commerce platform with multi-role ordering workflows, inventory operations, admin dashboards, reporting, scheduled jobs, email flows, and large internal datasets.
highlights: Developed multi-role admin and business workflows for ordering, inventory, and reporting
Built complex React interfaces for large operational datasets
Implemented backend APIs, scheduled jobs, email flows, and Excel export/import tools
Improved maintainability of long-running business logic in an active production system
Supported iterative development and debugging of client-specific workflows
description: This NDA-protected B2B commerce platform supports multi-role purchasing workflows, inventory operations, order management, administrative dashboards, reporting tools, and large internal datasets across multiple business regions.

The project includes long-term maintenance and iterative development: building new internal tools requested by the client, debugging complex business logic, and improving the maintainability of long-running workflows in an active production system.

modularWebPlatforms.title: Modular Web Platforms
modularWebPlatforms.subtitle: Multi-module React platform combining education, recruitment, and administration workflows.
modularWebPlatforms.short: A modular web platform combining learning management, job vacancies, and an administrative dashboard.
highlights: Modular architecture supporting multiple independent sub-projects
Hierarchical learning system with task customization and progress tracking
Job vacancy management with search, filtering, and applicant workflows
Centralized admin panel for content, users, and operational oversight
Production deployment using AWS infrastructure
description: Modular Web Platforms is a scalable web solution composed of several interconnected sub-systems, designed to support different business and educational use cases within a single architecture.
The educational module implements a hierarchical learning structure with configurable tasks, progress tracking, and user-friendly interfaces focused on clarity and usability.
The recruitment module provides functionality for creating and managing job vacancies, including applicant-facing search and filtering as well as internal tracking of applications.
An administrative dashboard enables centralized management of vacancies, user interactions, and platform operations, ensuring consistency and operational control across all modules.
The platform was built with a modern React and TypeScript stack and deployed using AWS services, with a strong focus on maintainability, scalability, and code quality.

cryptoPulseDashboard.title: Crypto Pulse Dashboard
cryptoPulseDashboard.subtitle: Real-time cryptocurrency dashboard with live WebSocket feed, interactive charts and historical pagination.
cryptoPulseDashboard.short: Vue 3 dashboard that streams 400+ Binance USDT pairs over WebSocket with candlestick and line charts.
highlights: Live price stream over a single WebSocket connection with auto-reconnect and exponential backoff
Onboarding with the full Binance USDT catalog (400+ pairs), recommended preset and debounced search
Line and candlestick charts with six range presets, historical pagination and Vue-rendered OHLC hover panel
Layered architecture — services, stores, composables, components — kept under a 200-line file rule
description: Crypto Pulse Dashboard is a portfolio-grade test assignment that demonstrates clean architecture, real-time data handling and a polished UI.
A single WebSocket client subscribes to the Binance !ticker@arr stream, normalizes the payload, filters by user-selected coins and throttles UI updates to one per second.
An onboarding flow lets the user pick from 400+ USDT trading pairs lazy-loaded from /exchangeInfo, with recommended coins pre-selected and a debounced search.
The coin details page renders Apache ECharts with both line area and candlestick types, six range presets (1D / 1W / 1M / 3M / 1Y / ALL) and historical pagination via the klines endTime parameter.

quantPilotAiStrategyLab.title: QuantPilot AI — Strategy Lab
quantPilotAiStrategyLab.subtitle: AI-assisted research platform that turns natural-language strategy ideas into validated, backtestable experiments with structured outputs, background workers, real-time progress, and audit logs.
quantPilotAiStrategyLab.short: AI-assisted research platform that turns natural-language strategy ideas into validated structured specs, backtested through an event-driven engine, with background jobs and real-time progress.
highlights: AI co-pilot turns a natural-language idea into a whitelisted, Zod-validated StrategySpec — structured data, never executed code — then backtests and refines it
Single event-driven engine doubles as backtester and paper executor (deterministic, look-ahead-safe); models fees and funding, reports equity, P&L, win-rate, profit factor, MFE/MAE
Multi-coin sweeps run as background jobs (BullMQ + Redis) under a CPU budget with live ETA and Socket.IO progress; results validated in-sample vs out-of-sample, across coins and years
Human-in-the-loop Approval Gate — AI proposes parameter/regime changes, the user approves them transactionally with a full audit trail; thresholds and routing are versioned config-in-DB
description: QuantPilot AI is a local, single-user research platform for AI-assisted strategy research on Binance USD-M perpetual futures.

In the Strategy Lab, you describe a strategy in natural language and an AI co-pilot returns a structured StrategySpec validated against a strict whitelist (no eval, no arbitrary code). The spec is executed, scored and iterated entirely inside the platform's own engine.

A single deterministic, event-driven engine serves as both the backtester and the paper executor, so what you test is literally what would trade. It models commissions and funding, and every result must survive an in-sample/out-of-sample split, cross-coin agreement and a slippage stress test before it counts.

The system never changes live logic on its own: an Approval Gate has the AI propose and the human approve, transactionally and with a full audit log. Risk thresholds, the regime-routing map and promotion criteria all live as versioned rows in the database, every decision is logged (including NO-TRADE), and real money is gated behind a PAPER → SHADOW → LIVE promotion threshold.

ndaHealthCoach.title: NDA Healthcare AI & Data Workflow Platform
ndaHealthCoach.subtitle: Healthcare platform with AI-assisted document processing, wearable-data integrations, real-time communication, and 3D/timeline data visualization.
ndaHealthCoach.short: NDA healthcare platform with AI-assisted document processing, patient-related data workflows, wearable-data integrations, background synchronization, real-time communication, and visualization modules.
highlights: Built AI-assisted document processing workflows using OpenAI, Azure Document Intelligence, and Google Document AI
Integrated external health and wearable-data APIs into background synchronization pipelines
Implemented real-time communication and avatar-based interaction features using LiveKit and HeyGen SDK
Developed timeline, chart, and 3D visualization modules for complex user data
Supported role-based access, admin workflows, and long-running background tasks
description: This NDA-protected healthcare platform includes patient-related data workflows, AI-assisted document processing, wearable-data integrations, real-time communication features, role-based access, background processing, and interactive visualization modules.

dataReportingWebApp.title: Early Automation Project — Google Sheets Reporting
dataReportingWebApp.subtitle: Client-focused web tool for data search and automated Excel report generation.
dataReportingWebApp.short: A lightweight reporting automation tool using Google Apps Script and Google Sheets API for keyword search and Excel-style report generation.
highlights: Parallel request handling with real-time status tracking
Global keyword-based search across large datasets
Automated Excel report generation using Google Sheets
Client-oriented UI focused on efficiency and clarity
description: This project involved the development of a custom web application designed to streamline data discovery and reporting workflows for a client.
The application supports extensive keyword-based searches across large datasets, enabling users to efficiently locate and analyze relevant information.
Frontend logic was implemented to manage multiple parallel requests, providing real-time visibility into request progress and improving overall user interaction.
Report generation was automated using Google Apps Script and the Google Sheets API, producing structured Excel reports based on keyword analysis.
The solution was built with standard web technologies, ensuring a responsive interface tailored to the client’s operational needs.

boomfShopifyWebApp.title: Boomf Shopify Web Application
boomfShopifyWebApp.subtitle: Interactive Shopify-integrated web application for customizable postcard products.
boomfShopifyWebApp.short: Commercial Shopify-integrated React application for interactive product customization and checkout-related user flows.
highlights: Highly interactive postcard customizer integrated directly into Shopify
Complex frontend state management using Redux and Redux-Saga
Scalable and maintainable styling with Styled Components
Seamless integration with Shopify API for product and order data
description: This project involved the development of a sophisticated web application for Boomf, built in close collaboration with another developer and fully integrated with the Shopify platform.
The core feature of the application is an interactive postcard customizer that allows users to design personalized cards with unique mechanical elements directly within the purchasing flow.
Advanced frontend logic was implemented using React, Redux, and Redux-Saga to manage asynchronous operations, complex state transitions, and data synchronization.
Styled Components were used to create modular and scalable styles, ensuring a consistent visual identity and high-quality user experience.
The application integrates with the Shopify API to handle product data, pricing, and order-related interactions in a reliable and performant manner.

resume.title: Resume

cv.headline: AI-Focused Full-Stack Engineer
cv.summary: Full-stack engineer with 5+ years building production web platforms with React, Node.js and TypeScript. I focus on AI integrations (OpenAI, document processing), background workers and queues, REST APIs, real-time systems, and B2B/healthcare business workflows — taking features from concept to production.

points: Build and maintain production platforms across B2B commerce, healthcare, and fintech/automation domains with React, Node.js, and TypeScript.
Implement AI integrations and document-processing workflows, background workers, queues, real-time features, and external API integrations.
Develop dashboards, admin panels, role-based workflows, reporting tools, and data-heavy user interfaces.
Led selected project areas by breaking down tasks, reviewing implementation decisions, mentoring developers, and coordinating delivery of client-facing features.
Built CMS-driven pages and reusable UI components with React/Next.js and TypeScript, consuming API- and GraphQL-driven data.
Implemented responsive layouts and forms, fixed bugs, and provided production support across client web projects.

boxhill.title: Boxhill Institute Web Application
boxhill.subtitle: Template-driven Next.js platform with 11 recursive content blocks generating 500+ pages from DatoCMS for an Australian educational institute.
boxhill.short: A Next.js platform with a recursive template system assembling 500+ pages from 11 content block types and DatoCMS data.
highlights: Designed and implemented 11 reusable content block templates that recursively assemble pages based on nested data structures from DatoCMS
Built the data retrieval logic using GraphQL and Apollo Client with caching optimized for a 500+ page static build
Developed enrollment forms with multi-step validation and reCAPTCHA integration for trial lesson registration
Integrated Google Maps with custom styling for campus and location pages
Implemented responsive layouts with SCSS ensuring cross-browser consistency
description: A team project for Box Hill Institute — an Australian educational platform. Built with Next.js and DatoCMS as a headless CMS, the application generates over 500 pages at build time.

The core of the project is a recursive template system consisting of 11 distinct content block types. Each block handles a specific data structure from DatoCMS and can be nested within other blocks, allowing the system to dynamically compose complex page layouts based on the depth and hierarchy of the incoming data.

Beyond the template engine, the project involved building interactive enrollment forms with reCAPTCHA protection for trial lesson registration, integrating Google Maps with custom styling for campus pages, and implementing responsive design with SCSS across the entire platform.
